member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.BaseCashLedgerQuery
member.summary: Input query DTO used to retrieve cash ledger transactions.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.BaseCashLedgerTotalsQuery
member.summary: Base input query DTO used to retrieve cash ledger totals.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.BaseCashTransactionEntryDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to retrieve cash ledger transaction entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashAccountStatus
member.summary: Enumerates the cash account status in a cash ledger transaction entry.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashEntryDescriptor
member.summary: Output DTO used to retrieve cash ledger transaction entries for use in lists.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashEntryFields
member.summary: Input fields used to update cash ledger transaction entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashLedgerTotalEntryDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to retrieve cash ledger totals.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashTransactionDescriptor
member.summary: Output DTO used to retrieve cash ledger transactions for use in lists.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.Integration.IntegrationLibrary
member.summary: Static library with general purpose methods.
